message:
feat: adaptive watchdog thresholds via scalar Kalman filter (wa-1qz1.7)

Per-component Kalman filter tracks inter-heartbeat intervals and
computes adaptive thresholds at μ + k·σ. Falls back to fixed thresholds
during warmup. z-score based health classification. 34 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
